de.uka.ilkd.key.gui

Class MainWindowTabbedPane

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • javax.swing.JComponent
          • javax.swing.JTabbedPane
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.MainWindowTabbedPane
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, java.io.Serializable, javax.accessibility.Accessible, javax.swing.SwingConstants
    Deprecated.

    @Deprecated
public class MainWindowTabbedPane
extends javax.swing.JTabbedPane
    JTabbedPane displayed in MainWindow, to the left of SequentView.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
